title: [MTR] 700 Series Shinkansen
description: 700 Series Shinkansen Nozomi & Hikari addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds two variants of the 700 Series Shinkansen family to the game :
- Nozomi 700 Series
- Hikari 700 Series

Both variants include cabs, standard cars, green cars and pantograph cars.

[Check out this page for the Dr Yellow version!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-doctor-yellow)

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

Please enjoy it!

![My cat sitting next to the Hikari and Nozomi Shinkansen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b77bf9a5377777c610205b04ba37cb6e694977.jpeg)
